caption: The video captures a nighttime scene illuminated by a greenish light, likely from a security camera with night vision. The setting appears to be an outdoor area, possibly a backyard or a garden, with a grassy ground and some trees in the background. A wooden ladder is positioned upright on the right side of the frame, next to a small green bucket. A black hose lies on the ground near the ladder. In the background, there is a structure that resembles a shed or a small building with a window emitting a bright light. The scene remains static throughout the frames, with no visible movement or activity occurring. The overall atmosphere is quiet and still, suggesting a peaceful night with no immediate action taking place.
